/CAL SENTENCING/AJW/CH1 ISS PROB 3 Y PJ 6 M/CTS 119/CCPV/DEF IS DNA-COMPLIANT/WS/11590/PF1000/VF4:200/PROBFINE/SECFEE/PC/PSR/BKFEE/COLLECT/SA2:150YARDS FROM MARKET, LARKIN, BUSH & POWELL STREETS IN SAN FRANCISCO,CA/X:STAY-AWAY ORDER PREVIOUSLY FILED ON 11-04-08,/OBEY/ACCEP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN:OFFICER RICHARD YICK/EXHM:PEOPLE'S 1 -BROWN EVIDENCE ENVELOPE/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1A - 5X3  CLEAR PLASTIC BAGGIE CONTAINING OFF WHITE ROCK LIKE SUBSTANCE (BROKEN UP) WITH E1 MARKING;  PEOPLE'S 1B - 5X3  PLASTIC BAGGIE WITH A METAL CONTAINER (SCREW TOP CAP) WITH SOMECONTENTS - E2 MARKING; PEOPLE'S 1C - 5X3  PLASTIC BAGGIE CONTAINING 2 PLASTIC CONTAINER WITH GREENISH ROUND PILLS WITH E3 MARKINGS; PEOPLE'S 1D - 8X11  PAPER SFPD CRIME LAB NARCOTICS RE-ANALYSIS REPORT SIGNED BY FRANCIS WOO//EXHM:DEFENSE A - 4-PAGE DOCUMENT (PHOTOCOPY OF DEFENDANT'S CDL AND MEDICALRECORDS, ETC)/X:COURT FINDS DEFENDANT TO HAVE COMMITTED AN ADDED COUNT 4,11350(A)HS, A FELONY,/HTA1:1, 2, AND 4/871D:3/BAIL:35,000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/

/X:OFFICE OF PUBLIC DEFENDER DECLARES CONFLICT,/CON:FRANK RODEZNO/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/X:DEFENDANT PERSONALLYWAIVES RIGHT TO A PRELIMINARY HEARING TO BE HEARD WITHIN 10 DAYS, BUT DOESNOT WAIVE RIGHT TO A PRELIMINARY HEARING TO BE COMPLETED WITHIN 60 CALENDARS,/LD:10-07-08/987,2/BAIL:35,000/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:PRELIMINARYHEARING/DOP/
/CAL: SENTENCE IN #10034694/CTORD:PROBATION IN #2379924 IS HEREBY TERMINATED AS UNSUCCESSFUL/
/CAL?TO SET DA MTR HEARING/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'SOFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON:ADAM GASNER /CONT/
/CAL DA MTR FILING/CONTD TS DA MTR/WIAMTR/S10 /TBH 10034694/PROB ADM REV/ER/NB/CONTD TO SET DA MTR(TRAILING)/DOP/
/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS: 3//FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:12-02-08/REMA/
